summary: The video shows a rainy day with multiple cars traveling on a multi-laned road. Vehicles are moving steadily, with some turning right at an intersection. Raindrops are visible on the windshield, indicating wet conditions.

events_timeline.event: Multiple vehicles are seen driving on a multi-laned road under rainy conditions. Cars are traveling at moderate speeds, with some making turns.

uncertainties: Exact speed of vehicles is unknown due to rain and visibility limitations.
Precise location of the intersection is unclear.

risk_assessment.why: The scene depicts normal traffic flow without any apparent collisions or hazardous interactions. Vehicles maintain reasonable distances and speeds, and there are no indications of reckless driving or sudden maneuvers.
